mapper.insert: insert into LSMD_T (LSMD_T_ID, LSMD001, LSMD002, LSMD003, LSMD004, LSMD005, LSMD006, LSMD008, LSMD010, LSMD013, LSMD014, LSMD015, LSMD017,LSMD018,LSMD019, LSMD020, LSMD024, LSMD025, LSMD026, LSMD027, LSMD028, LSMD029, LSMD030, LSMD031, LSMD033, LSMD036, LSMD037, LSMD039, LSMD042, LSMD045, LSMD046, LSMD047, LSMD053, LSMD054, LSMD055, LSMD058, LSMD083, LSMD084,LSMD085, LSMD086, LSMD906,LSMD907, LSMDCRTDT, LSMDCRTID, LSMDENT, LSMDMODDT, LSMDMODID, LSMDOWNDP, LSMDOWNID, LSMDSITE,LSMDSTUS) values (#{lsmdTId}, #{lsmd001}, #{lsmd002}, #{lsmd003}, #{lsmd004}, #{lsmd005}, #{lsmd006},#{lsmd008},#{lsmd010}, #{lsmd013}, #{lsmd014},#{lsmd015}, #{lsmd017}, #{lsmd018}, #{lsmd019}, #{lsmd020}, #{lsmd024}, #{lsmd025}, #{lsmd026}, #{lsmd027}, #{lsmd028}, #{lsmd029}, #{lsmd030}, #{lsmd031}, #{lsmd033}, #{lsmd036},#{lsmd037},#{lsmd039}, #{lsmd042},#{lsmd045}, #{lsmd046},#{lsmd047}, #{lsmd053}, #{lsmd054},#{lsmd055}, #{lsmd058}, #{lsmd083}, #{lsmd084}, #{lsmd085}, #{lsmd086}, #{lsmd906},#{lsmd907}, #{lsmdcrtdt}, #{lsmdcrtid}, #{lsmdent}, #{lsmdmoddt}, #{lsmdmodid}, #{lsmdowndp}, #{lsmdownid}, #{lsmdsite}, #{lsmdstus})

insert into LSMD_T ( LSMD_T_ID, LSMD001, LSMD002, LSMD003, LSMD004, LSMD005, LSMD006, LSMD007, LSMD008, LSMD010, LSMD013, LSMD014, LSMD015, LSMD019, LSMD024, LSMD025, LSMD026, LSMD027, LSMD028, LSMD029, LSMD030, LSMD031, LSMD033, LSMD036, LSMD037, LSMD038,LSMD039, LSMD042, LSMD045, LSMD046, LSMD047, LSMD053, LSMD054, LSMD055, LSMD058, LSMD081,LSMD082, LSMD083, LSMD084, LSMD085, LSMD086, LSMD906, LSMD907, LSMDCRTDT, LSMDCRTID, LSMDENT, LSMDMODDT, LSMDMODID, LSMDOWNDP, LSMDOWNID, LSMDSITE, LSMDSTUS ) values ( #{lsmdTId}, #{lsmd001}, #{lsmd002}, #{lsmd003}, #{lsmd004}, #{lsmd005}, #{lsmd006}, #{lsmd007}, #{lsmd008}, #{lsmd010}, #{lsmd013}, #{lsmd014}, #{lsmd015}, #{lsmd019}, #{lsmd024}, #{lsmd025}, #{lsmd026}, #{lsmd027}, #{lsmd028}, #{lsmd029}, #{lsmd030}, #{lsmd031}, #{lsmd033},#{lsmd036}, #{lsmd037}, #{lsmd038}, #{lsmd039}, #{lsmd042}, #{lsmd045}, #{lsmd046}, #{lsmd047}, #{lsmd053}, #{lsmd054}, #{lsmd055}, #{lsmd058}, #{lsmd081},#{lsmd082}, #{lsmd083}, #{lsmd084}, #{lsmd085}, #{lsmd086}, #{lsmd906}, #{lsmd907}, #{lsmdcrtdt}, #{lsmdcrtid}, #{lsmdent}, #{lsmdmoddt}, #{lsmdmodid}, #{lsmdowndp}, #{lsmdownid}, #{lsmdsite}, #{lsmdstus} )
mapper.update: UPDATE bm_barcode_detail SET qty -= #{transferQty} WHERE barcode = #{barcode}

update.foreach: UPDATE bm_barcode_detail SET qty -= #{item.matchQty} WHERE barcode = #{item.barcode}

mapper.select:
SELECT barcode barcode, item_no itemCode, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, unit_no unitCode, ISNULL(unit_name,'') unitName, ISNULL(sn_warehouse_no,'') warehouseCode, ISNULL(sn_cell_no,'') binCode, qty matchQty, org_no shjg FROM bm_barcode_detail WHERE 1=1
and barcode = #{barcode}

SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_CODE AS employeeCode, e.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS employeeName, ISNULL(au.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE,'')AS departmentCode, ISNULL(au.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME,'')AS departmentName FROM EMPLOYEE AS e LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE_D AS ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID AND ed.IS_PRIMARY = 1 LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS au ON au.ADMIN_UNIT_ID = ed.ADMIN_UNIT_ID
e.ApproveStatus = 'Y'
AND e.EMPLOYEE_NAME like CONCAT('%',#{employeeName},'%')

SELECT lot_att30,barcode,item_no itemCode,item_name itemName,item_spec itemSpec, unit_no unitNo,unit_name unitName, (qty - ISNULL(standard_col13,0.0)) AS qty,sn_warehouse_no warehouseCode, sn_cell_no binCode,remark,org_no shjg,combination_lot_no lotCode, customer_no customerNo,source_no sourceNo FROM bm_barcode_detail WHERE barcode = #{barcode}
SELECT SUM(qty) FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE barcode = #{barcode} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = #{chatType}

SELECT id, sn_from_warehouse_no fromWarehouseCode, sn_from_cell_no fromBinCode, sn_to_warehouse_no toWarehouseCode, sn_to_cell_no toBinCode, item_no itemNo, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, barcode barcode, qty matchQty, unit_no unitNo, unit_name unitName, chag_type chagType, status_code statusCode, create_by createBy, create_date createDate, org_no shjg FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = 5
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = #{chagType}
mapper.select: SELECT id id, barcode barcode, qty qty, warehouse_no warehouseNo, cell_no cellNo, item_no itemNo, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, unit_no unitNo, unit_name unitNmae, reference_qty referenceQty, chag_type chagType, doc_return_flag docReturnFlag, status_code statusCode, stock_rate stockRate, stock_keep stockKeep, create_by createBy FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE status_code = 0 AND chag_type = #{chagType} AND create_by = #{createBy}

SELECT id, warehouse_no warehouseNo, cell_no cellNo, item_no itemNo, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, barcode barcode, qty, qty as matchQty, unit_no unitNo, chag_type chagType, status_code statusCode, create_by createBy, create_date createDate, org_no shjg, lot_att01 employeeCode, lot_att02 departmentCode, lot_att03 departmentName, lot_att04 projectId, lot_att05 carType, classify_type typeCode FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = #{chagType}

SELECT id id, barcode barcode, item_no itemNo, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, qty qty, reference_qty referenceQty, sn_from_warehouse_no snFromWarehouseNo, sn_from_cell_no snFromCellNo, sn_to_warehouse_no snToWarehouseNo, sn_to_cell_no snToCellNo, unit_no unitNo, unit_name unitNmae, chag_type chagType, status_code statusCode, create_by createBy, doc_return_flag docReturnFlag, stock_keep stockKeep, stock_rate stockRate FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE status_code = 0 AND chag_type = #{chagType} AND create_by = #{createBy} AND barcode = #{barcode}

SELECT DOC_CODE typeCode,DOC_FULL_NAME typeName FROM DOC LEFT JOIN PLANT ON DOC.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT_ID WHERE DOC_CODE IN ('1100','1101','1104','1109','1110','1111','1112','1113','1119','1125','1150','1120','1155','1161','1162','1199','1223','1224') AND PLANT_CODE = #{shjg} ORDER BY DOC_CODE ASC

SELECT DOC_CODE typeCode,DOC_FULL_NAME typeName FROM DOC LEFT JOIN PLANT ON DOC.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT_ID WHERE DOC_CODE IN ('1105','1106','1107','1108','1115','1116','1117','1151','1152','1171') AND PLANT_CODE = #{shjg} ORDER BY DOC_CODE ASC
select DISTINCT org_no from inv_barcode_operation where create_by = #{createBy} and chag_type= 7

SELECT PROJECT_ID AS projectId,PROJECT_CODE AS projectCode,PROJECT_NAME AS projectName,PROJECT_DESC AS projectDesc FROM PROJECT
CLOSE_STATUS = '0'
AND PROJECT_NAME LIKE '%' + #{projectName} + '%'
SELECT ITEM_BUSINESS_ID FROM ITEM WHERE ITEM_CODE = #{itemCode}

SELECT TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_ID AS itemId,TRANSACTION_DOC_D.TRANSACTION_DOC_D_ID AS transactionDocDId FROM TRANSACTION_DOC LEFT JOIN TRANSACTION_DOC_D ON TRANSACTION_DOC.TRANSACTION_DOC_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC_D.TRANSACTION_DOC_ID WHERE DOC_NO = #{docNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE TRANSACTION_DOC_D SET PROJECT_ID = #{projectId},UDF021=#{carType} WHERE TRANSACTION_DOC_D_ID = #{transactionDocDId}
UPDATE TRANSACTION_DOC SET REMARK = #{remark} WHERE DOC_NO = #{docNo}
